\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Abstract base class for domains. 

Provides methods to assemble the linear system of equations, compute fields, and query material properties. Derived classes must implement Green\textquotesingle{}s function initialization, material permittivity/permeability, and scattering metrics. 

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{Domain_8h_source_l00038}{38}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{Domain_8h_source}{Domain.\+h}}.
